compiled_state.title: Document directory monitor config keys in CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Add directory_monitor.file_threshold and directory_monitor.exclude_dirs to plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md.

Document:
- Key name, type, default value, description
- Example usage
- Interaction with .gitignore (git ls-files automatically excludes .gitignore entries)

Follow existing format in the configuration reference file.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md contains directory_monitor.file_threshold entry
  Verify: grep -q 'directory_monitor.file_threshold' plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md
- [ ] CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md contains directory_monitor.exclude_dirs entry
  Verify: grep -q 'directory_monitor.exclude_dirs' plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md
- [ ] Entries include default values (30 and .git respectively)
  Verify: grep -A2 'directory_monitor.file_threshold' plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md | grep -q '30'
